title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II-G.  ADULT BRAIN INJURY FACILITIES

§2120.31.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Adult Brain Injury Facility Licensing Law".

Acts 2005, No. 245, §1, eff. June 29, 2005.
